typecheck.details: Kernel binary builds successfully. Warnings present (unused variables, unused imports in render library) but no errors.

lint.details: No separate lint tool configured (no clippy). Build warnings serve as lint: 13 warnings in render library (unused variables, unused imports, dead code make_ctx), 2 in fonts, 1 in drawing. All non-fatal.

nonBlockingIssues.description: All CpuBackend fields are pub, exposing internal state (glyph caches, damage tracker, surface pool). Consider pub(crate) in follow-up if compositor only accesses via RenderBackend trait.
CpuBackend has no constructor (new/from) method — fields must be initialized manually via struct literal.
Dead code: make_ctx() method defined in CpuBackend but never called. Should be removed or marked #[allow(dead_code)].
First-frame rendering bypasses prepare_frame(), directly calling backend.damage.mark_full_screen(). Works correctly but couples compositor to CpuBackend internals.
Minor redundant damage.count check after prepare_frame() returns Partial — prepare_frame only returns Partial when count > 0.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated architecture.md PREV_BOUNDS section to reflect new ownership: prev_bounds is now a field of render::CpuBackend in libraries/render/, not a compositor static mut.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note to os-worker skill's TDD step: 'For pure refactoring features where existing tests serve as the behavioral specification, the TDD step can be skipped — existing passing tests ARE the spec.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both features were pure refactoring (extract + wire). Workers correctly identified that writing new tests before extracting existing code is unnecessary when 1,764 existing tests define the behavior contract.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note to refactor-worker skill about creating Cargo.toml for new libraries used by the test crate (needed for host-side Cargo dependency resolution, separate from bare-metal build.rs flow).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: create-render-library worker's skillFeedback noted this gap — the skill didn't mention Cargo.toml creation for new libraries.

rejectedObservations.observation: build-system.md already updated with render library rlib chain position
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — build-system.md was correctly updated by the create-render-library worker during implementation
